title: Severe Headache - Migraine with Aura
chief_complaint: Severe unilateral headache for 6 hours, throbbing, with nausea and visual disturbances (flashing lights)

hidden_data.ct_head: Normal CT brain, no hemorrhage, no mass effect

key_learning_points: Triptans are first-line for acute attacks

patient_responses.headache_start: It started this morning when I woke up, about 6 hours ago
patient_responses.visual_symptoms: I saw flashing zigzag lights in my right eye for about 20 minutes before the pain started
patient_responses.similar_episodes: Yes, I get these headaches about once a month, usually with my period
patient_responses.pain_location: It's on the left side of my head, behind my eye

hints.triggers: Common triggers: stress, hormones, certain foods
